gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands with arms open wide, smiling and nodding while inviting learners to look at the colorful objects
a person shifts weight slightly to the side, tilting their head and pointing toward the rows of objects as they ask a question
a tutor bends forward slightly, extending both hands outward as if demonstrating the action of grouping objects in twos
a person raises one finger energetically while turning to the learners and counting out loud as if including them in the total
a tutor claps hands together gently and moves from side to side while inviting the class to count pairs of objects
a person steps closer, pointing at the screen and encouraging learners to actively find and count the groups of two
a tutor stands tall, spreading arms wide with enthusiasm as they recap the lesson about multiplying by two with groups
a person gives a thumbs up and nods appreciatively while smiling at the learners to celebrate their counting and grouping
